text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What's this? King, you haven't even<n>touched
your yogurt!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, because I'm aiming to be in<n>first-rate shape
for my next race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! Then, give it to me! I'm still<n>hungry, no
matter how much food I<n>munch on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome to it, but... are you<n>sure that's a
good idea? You might<n>consider tightening up your
diet as<n>well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'd like my competition to be in tip-top<n>shape, you
know. Otherwi—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to worry about me! I<n>run a tight
ship. As tight as the knot<n>on a lucky talisman.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? Then perhaps you could<n>explain why
your skirt looks so tight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyaah! How cruel can you beee?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What in the world?! I think the clasp<n>of your skirt
just flew off and hit me<n>on the forehead!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's it! You get outside and getrunning! That's your punishmentfor letting that thing hit me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's morning run<n>helps her get
back in shape.
